insight.title: How did you find the location button?
insight.subtitle: Location icon is universal
insight.locationDesc: The pin icon is a world standard symbol for current location.
insight.compassDesc: Compass icon resets orientation to north.
insight.zoomDesc: Two-finger pinch gesture is standard worldwide.

quiz2.failureReason: Search for a destination in the search bar

insight.title: How did you find the search bar?
insight.subtitle: Magnifying glass means search
insight.searchDesc: Unified search icon across all apps.
insight.suggestDesc: Suggestion lists standard in map apps.
insight.pinDesc: Tapping result shows pin on map.

insight.title: How did you find navigation?
insight.subtitle: Arrow represents navigate
insight.routeDesc: Upper-right arrow is standard navigation button.
insight.transportDesc: Car, train, walk icons in a row.
insight.stepDesc: Large turn instructions continue from car navigation era.

insight.title: How did you find favorites?
insight.subtitle: Star mark means favorites
insight.starTitle: Star is the international favorites symbol
insight.starDesc: Star unified for favorites across maps and SNS.
insight.savedDesc: Saved places found in the list.
